seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Valletta, Malta
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Valletta, Malta. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Valletta? Explore the best places to visit in Valletta, Malta.
keywords: best places to visit in Valletta

places.name: St. John's Co-Cathedral
places.description: A stunning 16th-century cathedral built by the Knights of St. John, famous for its Caravaggio paintings.
places.seo_phrase: St. John's Co-Cathedral: Baroque Masterpiece in Valletta

places.name: Upper Barrakka Gardens
places.description: A public garden in Valletta offering breathtaking panoramic views of the Grand Harbour.
places.seo_phrase: Panoramic Views at Upper Barrakka Gardens, Valletta

places.name: National Museum of Archaeology
places.description: A museum displaying artifacts from Malta's Neolithic period and megalithic culture.
places.seo_phrase: National Museum of Archaeology: Discover Malta's Ancient Past

places.name: Grand Master's Palace
places.description: A historic palace that served as the administrative center of Malta for centuries.
places.seo_phrase: Grand Master's Palace: History of the Knights of Malta

places.name: Fort St. Elmo
places.description: A star-shaped fort at the tip of the Valletta peninsula with a rich military history.
places.seo_phrase: Fort St. Elmo: Defending the Maltese Islands

places.name: Lower Barrakka Gardens
places.description: A serene garden located at the tip of the Valletta peninsula, featuring a neoclassical temple.
places.seo_phrase: Lower Barrakka Gardens: A Peaceful Escape in Valletta

places.name: Casa Rocca Piccola
places.description: A 16th-century palace museum offering a glimpse into the lifestyle of the Maltese nobility.
places.seo_phrase: Casa Rocca Piccola: Living History in a Noble Home

places.name: Manoel Theatre
places.description: A prestigious theatre built in 1731, known for its stunning Baroque architecture and acoustics.
places.seo_phrase: Teatru Manoel: One of Europe's Oldest Theatres

places.name: Siege Bell War Memorial
places.description: A monument featuring a massive bronze bell that rings daily in memory of those who died during WWII.
places.seo_phrase: Siege Bell War Memorial: Honoring Malta's Heroes

places.name: Triton Fountain
places.description: A large Art Deco fountain featuring three bronze Tritons supporting a central basin.
places.seo_phrase: Triton Fountain: The Iconic Entrance to Valletta

seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Mdina, Malta

places.description: A beautiful 17th-century cathedral built on the site where tradition says St. Paul met Publius.
places.seo_phrase: St. Paul's Cathedral: The Jewel of Mdina

places.name: Mdina Gate
places.description: A stunning Baroque gate serving as the main entrance to the walled city of Mdina.

places.description: A popular tea garden located on the bastions of Mdina, famous for its cakes and views.

places.name: Palazzo Falson
places.description: One of the oldest buildings in Mdina, this medieval palace is a treasure chest of historical collections.

places.seo_phrase: Carmelite Priory: A Hidden Gem in Mdina

places.description: A charming chapel associated with the story of St. Agatha, who is said to have sheltered here.

places.name: Greek Gate
places.description: A smaller, historic entrance to Mdina, once used by the Greek community living in the area.
